dublinCore.dc:title: 119 HR 6102 IH: Citizen Ballot Protection Act
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

action.action-desc: Mr. Palmer (for himself, Mr. Clyde, and Mr. Moore of Alabama) introduced the following bill; which was referred to the Committee on House Administration

form.official-title: To amend the National Voter Registration Act of 1993 to permit a State to include as part of the mail voter registration form a requirement that applicants provide proof of citizenship, and for other purposes.

section.text: This Act may be cited as the Citizen Ballot Protection Act.

section.header: Contents of State mail voter registration form

subsection.text: Section 6(a) of the National Voter Registration Act of 1993 (52 U.S.C. 20505(a)) is amended—

paragraph.text: in paragraph (1), by inserting , except that a State may, in addition to the criteria stated in section 9(b), require that an applicant provide proof that the applicant is a citizen of the United States after elections for Federal office; and
in paragraph (2), by inserting and such form may include a requirement that the applicant provide proof that the applicant is a citizen of the United States after elections for Federal office.

subsection.text: Section 6(a)(1) of such Act (52 U.S.C. 20505(a)(1)) is amended by striking Federal Election Commission and inserting Election Assistance Commission.
This section shall take effect on the date of the enactment of this Act.
